title: Tether to Invest $20 Million in Strategic Financing Round for Mercado Bitcoin to Accelerate Onchain Financial Infrastructure in Latin America
content: Tether, the largest company in the digital asset industry, today announced an investment of $20 million in a strategic growth financing round for Mercado Bitcoin, Latin America’s leading on-chain financial services platform. The investment reflects […]
date: Investment supports Mercado Bitcoin’s expansion across tokenization, payments, credit, capital markets and regulated digital financial services 7 July 2026 –
